---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<script>document.body.classList.add('obs-active');</script>

<!-- Starfield -->
<div class="obs-starfield" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:4%;left:8%;--dur:3.8s;--del:0s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.8;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:9%;left:22%;--dur:4.5s;--del:0.6s;--lo:0.2;--hi:1;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:6%;left:41%;--dur:3.2s;--del:1.1s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.7;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:12%;left:58%;--dur:5s;--del:0.3s;--lo:0.15;--hi:0.95;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:3%;left:73%;--dur:3.6s;--del:1.8s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.75;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:18%;left:88%;--dur:4.2s;--del:0.9s;--lo:0.2;--hi:1;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:28%;left:5%;--dur:4.8s;--del:0.4s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.8;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:35%;left:33%;--dur:3.4s;--del:2.1s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.6;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:42%;left:66%;--dur:4.1s;--del:0.7s;--lo:0.15;--hi:0.9;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:50%;left:14%;--dur:3.9s;--del:1.5s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.7;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:55%;left:80%;--dur:4.7s;--del:0.2s;--lo:0.2;--hi:1;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:62%;left:47%;--dur:3.3s;--del:1.3s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.65;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:70%;left:91%;--dur:4.4s;--del:0.8s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.8;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:78%;left:27%;--dur:5.2s;--del:1.6s;--lo:0.15;--hi:0.95;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:85%;left:60%;--dur:3.7s;--del:0.5s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.7;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:15%;left:50%;--dur:3.5s;--del:1s;--lo:0.2;--hi:1;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:47%;left:96%;--dur:4.6s;--del:0.3s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.6;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:22%;left:3%;--dur:3.1s;--del:1.7s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.8;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:68%;left:12%;--dur:4.9s;--del:0.1s;--lo:0.15;--hi:0.9;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:91%;left:38%;--dur:4.3s;--del:2s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.75;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:33%;left:75%;--dur:3.9s;--del:1.2s;--lo:0.15;--hi:0.85;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:58%;left:55%;--dur:4.2s;--del:0.4s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.7;"></div>
  <div class="obs-star" style="width:1px;height:1px;top:74%;left:82%;--dur:3.6s;--del:1.9s;--lo:0.1;--hi:0.6;"></div>
</div>

<div class="obs-page">

  <!-- Identity -->
  <div class="obs-header">
    <p class="obs-eyebrow">Roo's Observatory · Est. 2025</p>
    <h1 class="obs-title">Roopa Kaustubha <em>Rayudu</em></h1>
    <p class="obs-subtitle">soft mind, sharp thinking</p>
    <p class="obs-note">
      I make things that are <strong>impactful and beautiful</strong> — or at least try to.
      Currently doing my Masters in IT in Business (Fintech) at SMU, building toward
      a career in risk and financial crime analytics. I'm drawn to the idea that
      rigorous thinking and careful aesthetics aren't opposites —
      the best work lives in that intersection.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- Experience -->
  <div class="obs-section">
    <p class="obs-section-label">Trajectory</p>
    <h2 class="obs-section-title">Experience</h2>

    <div class="obs-entry">
      <p class="obs-entry-org">Tata Consultancy Services · Citi Bank — Singapore</p>
      <div class="obs-entry-top">
        <span class="obs-entry-role">Assistant Systems Engineer</span>
        <span class="obs-entry-date">Aug 2024 – Dec 2025</span>
      </div>
      <p class="obs-entry-sub">Banking Environment Support & Risk Coordination</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Supported multiple banking applications across SIT and UAT environments, ensuring operational readiness before production releases.</li>
        <li>Managed certificate lifecycle governance, reducing authentication failures and operational risk across banking platforms.</li>
        <li>Maintained 99%+ environment stability during release cycles through proactive cross-functional coordination.</li>
        <li>Resolved high-priority incidents within SLA timelines, minimising impact to business testing and regulatory reporting schedules.</li>
        <li>Maintained audit-ready incident and change documentation in ServiceNow, aligned with internal control frameworks.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="obs-entry">
      <p class="obs-entry-org">Fergus Consultancy Group — Singapore</p>
      <div class="obs-entry-top">
        <span class="obs-entry-role">Management Consultant</span>
        <span class="obs-entry-date">Dec 2023 – Apr 2024</span>
      </div>
      <ul>
        <li>Advised clients across technology, healthcare, and financial services on regulatory documentation and compliance processes.</li>
        <li>Interpreted regulatory frameworks and aligned client documentation with statutory and governance requirements.</li>
        <li>Reduced compliance-related processing delays by 30% through improved documentation clarity and workflow redesign.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="obs-divider" />

  <!-- Education -->
  <div class="obs-section">
    <p class="obs-section-label">Formation</p>
    <h2 class="obs-section-title">Education</h2>

    <div class="obs-edu-entry">
      <p class="obs-edu-degree">Master of IT in Business — Financial Technology & Analytics</p>
      <p class="obs-edu-school">Singapore Management University (SMU) · Jan 2026 – Jun 2027</p>
      <p class="obs-edu-detail">Fintech track · Second semester</p>
    </div>

    <div class="obs-edu-entry">
      <p class="obs-edu-degree">Bachelor of Business Administration</p>
      <p class="obs-edu-school">ICFAI Business School, Hyderabad · Sep 2020 – May 2023</p>
      <p class="obs-edu-detail">GPA 3.50 / 4.00 · 5 merit scholarships across first four semesters</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="obs-divider" />

  <!-- Skills -->
  <div class="obs-section">
    <p class="obs-section-label">Instruments</p>
    <h2 class="obs-section-title">Skills</h2>
    <div class="obs-skills-grid">
      <div class="obs-skill-group">
        <p class="obs-skill-group-label">Programming</p>
        <p class="obs-skill-list">Python · SQL · R · Java</p>
      </div>
      <div class="obs-skill-group">
        <p class="obs-skill-group-label">Platforms & Tools</p>
        <p class="obs-skill-list">Splunk · ServiceNow · Jira · Git · Jenkins · Ansible · MySQL</p>
      </div>
      <div class="obs-skill-group">
        <p class="obs-skill-group-label">Analytics & Viz</p>
        <p class="obs-skill-list">Tableau · Excel Modelling · Quarto · R</p>
      </div>
      <div class="obs-skill-group">
        <p class="obs-skill-group-label">Domain</p>
        <p class="obs-skill-list">AML Typologies · KYC / CDD · SIT / UAT · Regulatory Compliance</p>
      </div>
      <div class="obs-skill-group">
        <p class="obs-skill-group-label">Languages</p>
        <p class="obs-skill-list">English · Hindi · Telugu</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="obs-divider" />

  <!-- Certifications -->
  <div class="obs-section">
    <p class="obs-section-label">Credentials</p>
    <h2 class="obs-section-title">Certifications</h2>
    <div class="obs-cert-list">
      <p class="obs-cert-item">ICA Certificate in KYC & Customer Due Diligence</p>
      <p class="obs-cert-item">M5 — Financial Advisory Regulations (MAS)</p>
      <p class="obs-cert-item">M9 / M9A — Life Insurance & Investment-Linked Products (MAS)</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Personal -->
  <div class="obs-personal">
    <p class="obs-personal-eyebrow">Beyond the telescope</p>
    <h2 class="obs-personal-title">On the other side of the work</h2>
    <p class="obs-personal-text">
      I am, at heart, a reader and a thinker. History, philosophy, literary fiction —
      I'm drawn to anything that tries to make sense of why things are the way they are.
      I think good storytelling and good analysis aren't so different: both are about
      finding the pattern underneath the surface, and then finding the right form
      to show it to someone else.
    </p>
  </div>

</div>
```
